name: Streaming Buffer Interval Experiment — Parakeet Variants + Granite
short_description: Benchmark the effect of streaming buffer extraction interval (500ms, 750ms, 1000ms) on latency and transcription quality across four models: parakeet-unified-en-0.6b, parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3, multitalker-parakeet-streaming-0.6b-v1, and Granite Speech 4.1 2B. All models biased with Rezolve domain keyword list. Dataset: gold-92.
